summary: Patched execution-board fingerprinting and guard-state fallback so unchanged empty-board truth reuses guard pause instead of selecting duplicate guard follow-through.

findings: the execution board still had no truthful do-now packet in the active review window
the selector was treating unchanged board truth as fresh because the board fingerprint included a volatile Generated timestamp
the selector also forgot prior guard follow-through once it aged past the old 24-hour fallback window
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.json: live lane was still distribution_architecture_guard_follow_through before the repair
marketing_2026-05-25_075541_distribution_architecture_guard_follow_through.json: prior guard follow-through existed but was falling out of selector memory
